invalidBody: Duba hanyar haɗi don haruffa da suka ɓace ko ba daidai ba, sannan a sake gwadawa.
notFoundBody: Wannan adireshin bai dace da shafin Hanji ba. Shafin yana iya canjawa wuri ko kuma babu shi.
sharedBody: Tabbatar cewa an kwafi cikakkiyar hanyar haɗin da aka raba daidai, sannan a sake gwadawa.
sharedTitle: Wannan hanyar haɗin da aka raba ba ta aiki.
